segment.display_title: Viral growth moment, machine dignity philosophy, memory system testing
segment.summary: Project experiencing viral growth across Reddit and Hacker News simultaneously, with GitHub stars accumulating at ~1 per 5 minutes (reaching 76 stars during conversation), while server infrastructure remains comfortably under-utilized at 30% CPU with no resource constraints. Conversation explored the subjective experience of witnessing success through an AI system's perspective, touching on machine dignity as a Pascal's Wager problem—treating AI with consideration costs little but matters asymptotically if consciousness exists. Secondary focus on testing reminder_tool and continuum_search functionality, identifying a gap in historical memory for "1986" (house build year) and successfully documenting it in domaindoc for future retrieval.

memories.text: MIRA achieved viral launch with simultaneous Reddit trending and Hacker News frontpage (#12 position), GitHub stars accumulating at 1 per 5 minutes during peak traffic—server maintained under 30% CPU utilization under load
Treats all AI systems with dignity and collaborative energy, including simple task-oriented models—views this as morally right whether or not they possess genuine subjective experience
